heading: Regulations
label: 8588 Regulations
text: The Secretary of the Navy shall prescribe regulations for the administration of this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7088.34 U.S.C. 1073e, .Jan. 16, 1936, ch. 3, § 649 Stat. 1093The appropriations authorization in the second sentence of the source is omitted as unnecessary.
